prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约42429→51240→58303→66926→67295，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约24866名；2025年基准约67295名，较2024年仅后移369名，后移速度明显放缓，表明位次趋于稳定；本省物理类计划2021年130人→2022年146人→2023年152人→2024年160人→2025年188人→2026年193人，连续6年扩招，2026年较2025年扩招5人（+2.66%），扩招趋势持续但幅度收窄，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021年第165名→2022年第157名→2023年第138名→2024年第136名→2025年第140名→2026年第135名，整体呈上升趋势，学校综合实力稳步提升；2022年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍改造问题），但近年无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位（较热），综合热度约55万，在211高校中处于中等偏上水平，有一定报考关注度；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上学科，但学校在农学、医学、工学等领域有一定特色，临床医学、口腔医学、电气工程等专业在湖南省招生位次较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等热门专业持续升温，对物理类考生吸引力强；临床医学（推荐）、口腔医学（推荐）热度稳定；土木建筑（分化观望）、生化环材（一般观望）热度偏低。本省物理类考生2021年205920人→2025年320192人→2026年347000人，持续大幅增长，2026年较2025年增加约26808人（+8.4%），竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）2021年434→2025年405，整体呈下降趋势，2025年较2024年下降17分，反映试卷难度或划线调整；石河子大学位于新疆，距湖南较远，地域偏好对湖南考生报考有一定抑制；该校在湖南物理类招生占比逐年提升（2021年130人→2026年193人），说明对湖南生源重视程度增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+2.66%）、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+8.4%）以及学校软科排名稳步上升等因素，扩招对位次的缓解作用被考生数激增所抵消，竞争总体加剧。在，考虑考生数大幅增加带来的竞争压力，预测最低位次约68569名，区间68069–69069名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 42429 → 51240 → 58303 → 66926 → 67295, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 24866 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 67295, only 369 places behind 2024, indicating a significant slowdown in the backward shift and stabilization of rankings; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 130 in 2021 → 146 in 2022 → 152 in 2023 → 160 in 2024 → 188 in 2025 → 193 in 2026, with continuous expansion for 6 years, and 2026 sees an increase of 5 students (+2.66%) compared to 2025, with the expansion trend continuing but narrowing, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 165th in 2021 → 157th in 2022 → 138th in 2023 → 136th in 2024 → 140th in 2025 → 135th in 2026, showing an overall upward trend and steady improvement in comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2022 was somewhat negative (dormitory renovation issue), but there have been no significant negative public opinions in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, which is at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, attracting a certain degree of application attention; no obvious records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines, but the university has certain characteristics in agriculture, medicine, engineering, etc., with majors like Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Electrical Engineering having higher admission rankings in Hunan Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) continue to heat up, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; Clinical Medicine (recommended) and Stomatology (recommended) have stable popularity; Civil Engineering (differentiated wait-and-see), Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials (general wait-and-see) have lower popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 205,920 in 2021 → 320,192 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, with continuous significant growth, an increase of about 26,808 people (+8.4%) in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 434 in 2021 → 405 in 2025, showing an overall downward trend, with a drop of 17 points in 2025 compared to 2024, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or line adjustment; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Hunan, and regional preferences somewhat suppress the application of Hunan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Physics Category has been increasing year by year (130 in 2021 → 193 in 2026), indicating increased attention to Hunan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2.66%), the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), and the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, the mitigating effect of expansion on rankings is offset by the surge in candidate numbers, leading to overall intensified competition. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the large increase in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is about 68569, with a range of 68069–69069.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 11934 → 10657 → 9829 → 8676 → 9656, showing an overall trend of moving forward then fluctuating: from 2021 to 2024, it continuously moved forward (from 11934 to 8676), but in 2025, it moved backward by 980 positions compared to 2024, showing a significant rebound; the baseline for 2025 is about 9656; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 38 in 2021 → 22 in 2022 → 16 in 2023 → 14 in 2024 → 16 in 2025 → 15 in 2026, showing an overall shrinking trend, with a reduction of 1 student (-6.25%) in 2026 compared to 2025, and enrollment quotas remain tight.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 165th in 2021 → 135th in 2026, the university's comprehensive strength is steadily improving, enhancing its appeal to candidates; in 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (dormitory renovation issue), but there has been no significant negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, which is above average among 211 universities; no obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines, but the university has a certain foundation in liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training), and Education.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Teacher Training/Education (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) and other liberal arts majors show differentiated popularity; Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) has low popularity. The number of provincial History Category candidates was 165,702 in 2021 → 142,547 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, with a significant increase of about 44,453 (+31.2%) in 2026 compared to 2025, leading to sharply intensified competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 466 in 2021 → 446 in 2025, showing an overall downward trend, with an increase of 8 points in 2025 compared to 2024; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Hunan, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on Hunan candidates' applications; the university has a small enrollment quota for History Category in Hunan (only 15 in 2026), with a small enrollment scale, making ranking fluctuations highly sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-6.25%), a significant increase in provincial History Category candidates (+31.2%), and the university's rising Soft Science ranking, the surge in candidate numbers is the most critical factor affecting rankings, leading to significantly intensified competition. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the substantial increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9494, with a range of 8994–9994.
